content.headline: St Andrews Old Course — your course, on a pint glass.
content.description_html:
A pint glass etched with the nine-hole front and back of St Andrews Old Course, St Andrews, Fife. Pour a beer and the line lands right where your score does.

Each set comes with two glasses — one for the front nine, one for the back. Track your round as you drink it.

Preorder now for the first run.
